title: Opaque HUD
description: Opaque HUD is a texture pack to make the HUD of the player opaque for whatever reason your heart desires.
body:
Opaque HUD is a texture pack to make the HUD of the player opaque for whatever reason your heart desires.


**_This does not affect inventory/menu/block GUIs._**


**_Affected Folders:_**
- <texture_pack>/assets/minecraft/textures/gui/sprites/hud **(ALL FILES)**
- <texture_pack>/assets/minecraft/textures/gui/sprites/boss_bar **(ALL FILES)**

**_Affected Files:_**
- <texture_pack>/assets/minecraft/texts/splashes.txt

**_How The Files Are Affected:_**
- The files have been altered solely by **lowering** the files **alpha levels** from **255 -> 166**

**_Future Goals:_**
- Add opacity to the XP number displayed above the XP bar. If anyone knows how to change that, please leave a comment or message me. Thank you.

Created by CalvinThePleb
